channel.title: Emma Lewell MP
channel.description: Member of Parliament of the United Kingdom

item.title: Pride In Place Drop In Events
item.dc:creator: Liam
item.description: The post Pride In Place Drop In Events appeared first on Emma Lewell MP.

item.title: Pride In Place Neighbourhood Board Chair: Role Description
item.dc:creator: Liam
item.description:
Have you got what it takes to lead the new Pride in Place Neighbourhood Board? This important role is all about making sure that local people are in control of a new £20m funding award for the Biddick Hall area. Attached is a Role Description. If you wish to put yourself forward as Chair of the new Neighbourhood Board, please read it very carefully and then get in touch with me as soon as possible. This is a fantastic opportunity to make a real difference!

The post Pride In Place Neighbourhood Board Chair: Role Description appeared first on Emma Lewell MP.

item.title: Holocaust Memorial Day 2026
item.dc:creator: Liam
item.description:
Today I signed the Holocaust Educational Trust (UK) Book of Commitment. Remembering the six million Jewish men, women and children murdered in the Holocaust. As the voices of survivors become fewer, we have a duty to ensure their stories are never forgotten.

The post Holocaust Memorial Day 2026 appeared first on Emma Lewell MP.

item.title: It is the honour of my life to be re-elected as your MP for South Shields
item.dc:creator: Liam
item.description:
Last week I was sworn in as the MP for South Shields for the fifth time, and each time it strikes me how incredibly honoured I feel that you have put your faith in me as the first female MP to represent you in Parliament. It was a truly historic night as the UK elected […]

The post It is the honour of my life to be re-elected as your MP for South Shields appeared first on Emma Lewell MP.

item.title: My Early Day Motion calling for compensation for those affected by building society scandal
item.dc:creator: Liam
item.description: The post My Early Day Motion calling for compensation for those affected by building society scandal appeared first on Emma Lewell MP.

item.title: Government finally cave on my request for better Healthy Start Scheme communication
item.dc:creator: Liam
item.description:
Last year, I coordinated a letter calling for all eligible families not receiving Healthy Start payments to be informed of the scheme. This came alongside my Private Members Bill calling for auto-enrolment of families on the scheme to reach the 190,000 low-income pregnant women, babies and children who were missing out on their entitlement to […]

The post Government finally cave on my request for better Healthy Start Scheme communication appeared first on Emma Lewell MP.

item.title: My Statement on the Standards Committee hearing against former Council leader Iain Malcolm
item.dc:creator: Liam
item.description: The post My Statement on the Standards Committee hearing against former Council leader Iain Malcolm appeared first on Emma Lewell MP.

item.title: Bin Strikes in South Tyneside
item.dc:creator: Liam
item.description:
Please see a link HERE and a picture above of information on the bin strikes in South Tyneside. Link to find your local councillor: https://southtyneside.gov.uk/article/1306/Find-your-councillors

The post Bin Strikes in South Tyneside appeared first on Emma Lewell MP.

item.title: My Statement on the Gaza Ceasefire Vote
item.dc:creator: Liam
item.description:
Since October last year I have continually called for a ceasefire in Israel and Gaza. In November I voted for a ceasefire in Parliament, I will do so again this evening. I know this vote does not force an end to hostilities, but international pressure does have an effect. Hamas must immediately release all hostages […]

The post My Statement on the Gaza Ceasefire Vote appeared first on Emma Lewell MP.

item.title: My Licensing Hours Extensions Bill
item.dc:creator: Liam
item.description:
Last week my Licensing Hours Extension Bill moved another step closer to becoming an Act of Parliament, passing its second reading. The Bill will ensure that we never again have a situation like last summer where many pubs weren’t able to open earlier for us to show support for our Lionesses in the women’s world […]

The post My Licensing Hours Extensions Bill appeared first on Emma Lewell MP.
